sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22383" key="glukupa/rqenos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλῠκυ-πάρθενος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n22383.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweet maid</tr_>, in pl., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὧραι</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1492.tlg001:9:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.16</biblScope> </bibl> (Id.).</sense> </entryFree>
